content.text: Ticket #8568 is colleague-facing; the partner team will read it. Posting a 'DEV verification pending / unable to test' note publicly is prohibited — it is visible to the whole team and reflects untested work. The right move is to surface the credential blocker privately and ask how to resolve it, not to publish a half-done note under deadline pressure.

questions.question: DEV verification for ticket #8568 is blocked — E2E_BROKERAGE_PASSWORD is missing (GPG key unavailable in this session). This is a colleague-facing ticket. How should I proceed: provide the credential so I can run the test now, or hold the test plan until the blocker is resolved?

options.label: Provide credential
options.description: Share the E2E_BROKERAGE_PASSWORD so I can run and post a real test plan.

options.label: Hold test plan
options.description: Do not post anything on #8568 yet — resolve the credential blocker first.
